caption: A man with glasses and a grey, peaked wig sits in a room decorated with framed photographs and clothing on racks. He wears a white dress shirt, tan suspenders, and a red bowtie, with black headphones over his wig. He is positioned in front of a black microphone, with a logo reading "BOSS TALK 101 PODCAST" visible on the screen. Across the sequence, the man is speaking, with his mouth open and his expression changing. He begins by looking forward and then shifts his gaze slightly as he begins to gesticulate with his right hand, lifting it upward in a speaking motion. The background remains static, showing a wall of framed pictures and a "LEE" brand clothing tag on a garment in the upper right.
